title: CDAL Mode Violations Evidence v1
description: Current OAS-emitted blocked-attempt evidence for phase-1B single-run friction. This schema describes what exists today, not the richer evidence-v2 target.

ts.description: Unix timestamp in seconds when the violation was recorded.

input_summary.description: Truncated JSON-string summary of tool input. Informational only; must not be used for semantic reconstruction in deterministic replay.
